{{Quote|At some point, his proximity may cause us significant problems.|[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Saren Llalik]]'s intelligence report on Cinto Alaras|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Cinto Alaras''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] medical [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]].

==Biography==
Alaras, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Rya]], studied on [[Carosi XII Academy of Medicine]], and thus in a pro-[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] environment; however, he never showed any support to the Rebellion.<ref name="AIR" />

He obtained a degree around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. A lazy and mediocre engineer, he was only offered a job, and he accepted: Designer and medical consultant for [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]] labs on [[Tauber]].<ref name="AIR" />

Alaras never designed anything on his own, preferring to provide minimal insight or coordinate other designers. Rebel Alliance Intelligence believed he would attempt to steal another person's design some day.<ref name="AIR" />

The person in the adjacent design station was Rebel secret agent [[Sommen]]. Rebel Alliance [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]], and particularly [[Saren Llalik]], were afraid of Alaras spying on Sommen's work and discovering his cover.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
